action_mappings.create_case: create reconciliation case {} if it is closed and not registered
action_mappings.link_transaction_to_case: link external transaction {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.unlink_transaction_from_case: unlink external transaction {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.attach_instruction_reference: attach instruction reference {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.detach_instruction_reference: detach instruction reference {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.validate_instruction_reference: validate instruction reference {} for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.attach_evidence_and_validate_instruction: attach evidence document {} to reconciliation case {} and validate instruction
action_mappings.submit_evidence_for_review: submit evidence for review for reconciliation case {} with instruction reference {} by operator {}
action_mappings.attach_settlement_event_to_case: attach settlement event {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.link_payment_message_to_case: link payment message {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.unlink_payment_message_from_case: unlink payment message {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.link_fee_to_case: link fee entry {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.unlink_fee_from_case: unlink fee entry {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.link_counterparty_to_case: link counterparty record {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.unlink_counterparty_from_case: unlink counterparty record {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.create_accounting_alignment_candidate: create accounting alignment candidate for reconciliation case {} with ledger entry {}, payment message {}, and account {}
action_mappings.create_complex_accounting_alignment: create complex accounting alignment for reconciliation case {} with ledger entry {}, fee entry {}, and system ticket {}
action_mappings.approve_accounting_alignment: approve accounting alignment for reconciliation case {} with payment message {} and account {}
action_mappings.create_remediation_ticket: create remediation ticket for reconciliation case {} linked to payment message {} and account {} assigned to resolver team {}
action_mappings.escalate_and_create_remediation_ticket: escalate and create remediation ticket for reconciliation case {} linked to fee entry {} and counterparty record {} assigned to escalation group {}
action_mappings.apply_remediation_and_mark_processed: apply remediation and mark reconciliation case {} processed linked to payment message {} and account {}
action_mappings.reapply_evidence_after_remediation: reapply evidence after remediation for reconciliation case {} using instruction reference {} with operator {}
action_mappings.verify_instruction_reference_for_settlem: verify instruction reference {} for settlement matching of reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.verify_evidence_document_for_settlement_: verify evidence document {} for settlement matching of reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.confirm_settlement_association: confirm settlement association between reconciliation case {} and settlement event {}
action_mappings.link_cross_ledger_settlement_event: link cross-ledger settlement event for vostro case {} and nostro case {} with settlement event {}
action_mappings.mark_evidence_review_complete: mark evidence review complete for vostro view {} with instruction reference {} by operator {}
action_mappings.close_case_with_settlement_event: close vostro view {} with settlement event {}
action_mappings.close_case_with_operator_acknowledgement: close vostro view {} with operator acknowledgement

action_mappings_indef.create_case: create a reconciliation case {} if it is closed and not registered
action_mappings_indef.link_transaction_to_case: link an external transaction {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unlink_transaction_from_case: unlink an external transaction {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.attach_instruction_reference: attach an instruction reference {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.detach_instruction_reference: detach an instruction reference {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.validate_instruction_reference: validate an instruction reference {} for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.attach_evidence_and_validate_instruction: attach an evidence document {} to a reconciliation case {} and validate instruction
action_mappings_indef.submit_evidence_for_review: submit evidence for review for a reconciliation case {} with an instruction reference {} by an operator {}
action_mappings_indef.attach_settlement_event_to_case: attach a settlement event {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.link_payment_message_to_case: link a payment message {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unlink_payment_message_from_case: unlink a payment message {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.link_account_to_case: link an account {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unlink_account_from_case: unlink an account {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.link_fee_to_case: link a fee entry {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unlink_fee_from_case: unlink a fee entry {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.link_counterparty_to_case: link a counterparty record {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unlink_counterparty_from_case: unlink a counterparty record {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.create_accounting_alignment_candidate: create accounting alignment candidate for a reconciliation case {} with a ledger entry {}, a payment message {}, and an account {}
action_mappings_indef.create_complex_accounting_alignment: create complex accounting alignment for a reconciliation case {} with a ledger entry {}, a fee entry {}, and a system ticket {}
action_mappings_indef.approve_accounting_alignment: approve accounting alignment for a reconciliation case {} with a payment message {} and an account {}
action_mappings_indef.create_remediation_ticket: create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case {} linked to a payment message {} and an account {} assigned to a resolver team {}
action_mappings_indef.escalate_and_create_remediation_ticket: escalate and create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case {} linked to a fee entry {} and a counterparty record {} assigned to an escalation group {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_remediation_and_mark_processed: apply remediation and mark a reconciliation case {} processed linked to a payment message {} and an account {}
action_mappings_indef.reapply_evidence_after_remediation: reapply evidence after remediation for a reconciliation case {} using an instruction reference {} with an operator {}
action_mappings_indef.verify_instruction_reference_for_settlem: verify an instruction reference {} for settlement matching of a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.verify_evidence_document_for_settlement_: verify an evidence document {} for settlement matching of a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_settlement_association: confirm settlement association between a reconciliation case {} and a settlement event {}
action_mappings_indef.link_cross_ledger_settlement_event: link cross-ledger settlement event for a vostro case {} and a nostro case {} with a settlement event {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_evidence_review_complete: mark evidence review complete for a vostro view {} with an instruction reference {} by an operator {}
action_mappings_indef.close_case_with_nostro_signoff: close a nostro view {} with signoff
action_mappings_indef.close_case_with_settlement_event: close a vostro view {} with a settlement event {}
action_mappings_indef.close_case_with_operator_acknowledgement: close a vostro view {} with operator acknowledgement

predicate_mappings.case_linked_transaction: the case {} is linked to the transaction {}
predicate_mappings.case_transaction_linked: the transaction is linked to the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_payment_message: {} is linked to the payment message {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_fee: {} is linked to the fee entry {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_counterparty: {} is linked to the counterparty record {}
predicate_mappings.case_linked_ledger_entry: {} is linked to the ledger entry {}
predicate_mappings.remediation_ticket_created: a remediation ticket is created for {}
predicate_mappings.case_settlement_candidate_from_vostro: {} is a case settlement candidate from vostro for {}
predicate_mappings.case_settlement_linked: {} is linked to the case settlement for {}
predicate_mappings.operator_review_completed: the operator review for {} is completed
predicate_mappings.external_transaction_available: {} is available as an external transaction
predicate_mappings.ledger_entry_available: {} is available as a ledger entry
predicate_mappings.payment_message_available: {} is available as a payment message
predicate_mappings.case_transaction_candidate: {} is a candidate for the transaction {}
predicate_mappings.case_ledger_entry_candidate: {} is a candidate for the ledger entry {}
predicate_mappings.case_payment_message_candidate: {} is a candidate for the payment message {}
predicate_mappings.case_account_candidate: {} is a candidate for the account {}
predicate_mappings.case_fee_candidate: {} is a candidate for the fee entry {}
predicate_mappings.case_system_ticket_candidate: {} is a candidate for the system ticket {}
predicate_mappings.case_counterparty_candidate: {} is a candidate for the counterparty record {}
predicate_mappings.case_resolution_queue_assignment: {} is assigned to the resolution queue {}
predicate_mappings.case_instruction_reference_candidate: {} is a case instruction reference candidate for {}
predicate_mappings.case_settlement_candidate_from_nostro: {} is a case settlement candidate from nostro for {}

create_case.description: create a reconciliation case A if it is closed and not registered
preconditions: I can only create a reconciliation case A if it is closed and not registered if it is not the case that the case A is registered and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I create a reconciliation case A if it is closed and not registered, it is the case that the case A is registered

link_transaction_to_case.description: link an external transaction B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link an external transaction B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available as an external transaction and A is a candidate for the transaction B
I can only link an external transaction B to a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the transaction is linked to the case A
effects: Once I link an external transaction B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A is linked to the transaction B and the transaction is linked to the case A
Once I link an external transaction B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an external transaction

unlink_transaction_from_case.description: unlink an external transaction B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink an external transaction B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is linked to the transaction B
I can only unlink an external transaction B from a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A is accounting aligned and it is not the case that a remediation ticket is created for A
effects: Once I unlink an external transaction B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available as an external transaction

Once I unlink an external transaction B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is linked to the transaction B and it is not the case anymore that the transaction is linked to the case A and it is not the case anymore that the instruction is validated for A and it is not the case anymore that evidence is attached to A and it is not the case anymore that A is pending remediation and it is not the case anymore that A has been processed for remediation and it is not the case anymore that A requires manager approval

attach_instruction_reference.description: attach an instruction reference B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only attach an instruction reference B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I attach an instruction reference B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is a case instruction reference candidate for B
Once I attach an instruction reference B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_instruction_reference.description: detach an instruction reference B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only detach an instruction reference B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is a case instruction reference candidate for B
effects: Once I detach an instruction reference B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach an instruction reference B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is a case instruction reference candidate for B

validate_instruction_reference.description: validate an instruction reference B for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only validate an instruction reference B for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and the transaction is linked to the case A and A is a case instruction reference candidate for B
I can only validate an instruction reference B for a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the instruction is validated for A
effects: Once I validate an instruction reference B for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the instruction is validated for A

attach_evidence_and_validate_instruction.description: attach an evidence document B to a reconciliation case A and validate instruction
preconditions: I can only attach an evidence document B to a reconciliation case A and validate instruction if it is the case that the case A is registered and the transaction is linked to the case A and B is available
I can only attach an evidence document B to a reconciliation case A and validate instruction if it is not the case that the instruction is validated for A
effects: Once I attach an evidence document B to a reconciliation case A and validate instruction, it is the case that the instruction is validated for A and A is pending remediation
Once I attach an evidence document B to a reconciliation case A and validate instruction, it is not the case anymore that B is available

submit_evidence_for_review.description: submit evidence for review for a reconciliation case A with an instruction reference B by an operator C
preconditions: I can only submit evidence for review for a reconciliation case A with an instruction reference B by an operator C if it is the case that the instruction is validated for A and the transaction is linked to the case A and A is a case instruction reference candidate for B and C is available
I can only submit evidence for review for a reconciliation case A with an instruction reference B by an operator C if it is not the case that evidence is attached to A
effects: Once I submit evidence for review for a reconciliation case A with an instruction reference B by an operator C, it is the case that evidence is attached to A
Once I submit evidence for review for a reconciliation case A with an instruction reference B by an operator C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending remediation

attach_settlement_event_to_case.description: attach a settlement event B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only attach a settlement event B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the transaction is linked to the case A and A is linked to the case settlement for B
I can only attach a settlement event B to a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that evidence is attached to A
effects: Once I attach a settlement event B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that evidence is attached to A
Once I attach a settlement event B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is pending remediation

link_payment_message_to_case.description: link a payment message B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a payment message B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available as a payment message and A is a candidate for the payment message B
effects: Once I link a payment message B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the payment message B
Once I link a payment message B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a payment message

unlink_payment_message_from_case.description: unlink a payment message B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a payment message B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the payment message B
effects: Once I unlink a payment message B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available as a payment message
Once I unlink a payment message B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the payment message B

link_account_to_case.description: link an account B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link an account B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the account B
effects: Once I link an account B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the account B
Once I link an account B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_account_from_case.description: unlink an account B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink an account B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the account B
effects: Once I unlink an account B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink an account B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the account B

link_fee_to_case.description: link a fee entry B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a fee entry B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the fee entry B
effects: Once I link a fee entry B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the fee entry B
Once I link a fee entry B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_fee_from_case.description: unlink a fee entry B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a fee entry B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the fee entry B
effects: Once I unlink a fee entry B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a fee entry B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the fee entry B

link_counterparty_to_case.description: link a counterparty record B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a counterparty record B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the counterparty record B
effects: Once I link a counterparty record B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the counterparty record B
Once I link a counterparty record B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_counterparty_from_case.description: unlink a counterparty record B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a counterparty record B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the counterparty record B
effects: Once I unlink a counterparty record B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a counterparty record B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the counterparty record B

create_accounting_alignment_candidate.description: create accounting alignment candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger entry B, a payment message C, and an account D
preconditions: I can only create accounting alignment candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger entry B, a payment message C, and an account D if it is the case that the transaction is linked to the case A and A is linked to the payment message C and A is linked to the account D and B is available as a ledger entry and A is a candidate for the ledger entry B
I can only create accounting alignment candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger entry B, a payment message C, and an account D if it is not the case that A is accounting aligned
effects: Once I create accounting alignment candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger entry B, a payment message C, and an account D, it is the case that A is linked to the ledger entry B and A is accounting aligned
Once I create accounting alignment candidate for a reconciliation case A with a ledger entry B, a payment message C, and an account D, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a ledger entry

create_complex_accounting_alignment.description: create complex accounting alignment for a reconciliation case A with a ledger entry B, a fee entry C, and a system ticket D
preconditions: I can only create complex accounting alignment for a reconciliation case A with a ledger entry B, a fee entry C, and a system ticket D if it is the case that the transaction is linked to the case A and A is linked to the fee entry C and D is open and B is available as a ledger entry and A is a candidate for the ledger entry B and A is a candidate for the system ticket D
I can only create complex accounting alignment for a reconciliation case A with a ledger entry B, a fee entry C, and a system ticket D if it is not the case that A is accounting aligned
effects: Once I create complex accounting alignment for a reconciliation case A with a ledger entry B, a fee entry C, and a system ticket D, it is the case that A is linked to the ledger entry B and A is accounting aligned and A requires manager approval and A is pending remediation

Once I create complex accounting alignment for a reconciliation case A with a ledger entry B, a fee entry C, and a system ticket D, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a ledger entry and it is not the case anymore that D is open

approve_accounting_alignment.description: approve accounting alignment for a reconciliation case A with a payment message B and an account C
preconditions: I can only approve accounting alignment for a reconciliation case A with a payment message B and an account C if it is the case that A is accounting aligned and A requires manager approval and A is linked to the payment message B and A is linked to the account C
effects: Once I approve accounting alignment for a reconciliation case A with a payment message B and an account C, it is not the case anymore that A requires manager approval and it is not the case anymore that A is pending remediation

create_remediation_ticket.description: create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case A linked to a payment message B and an account C assigned to a resolver team D
preconditions: I can only create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case A linked to a payment message B and an account C assigned to a resolver team D if it is the case that evidence is attached to A and A is accounting aligned and A is linked to the payment message B and A is linked to the account C and A is assigned to the resolution queue D

I can only create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case A linked to a payment message B and an account C assigned to a resolver team D if it is not the case that A is pending remediation and it is not the case that a remediation ticket is created for A
effects: Once I create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case A linked to a payment message B and an account C assigned to a resolver team D, it is the case that a remediation ticket is created for A

escalate_and_create_remediation_ticket.description: escalate and create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case A linked to a fee entry B and a counterparty record C assigned to an escalation group D
preconditions: I can only escalate and create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case A linked to a fee entry B and a counterparty record C assigned to an escalation group D if it is the case that evidence is attached to A and A is accounting aligned and A is linked to the fee entry B and A is linked to the counterparty record C and A is assigned to the resolution queue D

I can only escalate and create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case A linked to a fee entry B and a counterparty record C assigned to an escalation group D if it is not the case that a remediation ticket is created for A
effects: Once I escalate and create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case A linked to a fee entry B and a counterparty record C assigned to an escalation group D, it is the case that a remediation ticket is created for A and A is pending remediation

apply_remediation_and_mark_processed.description: apply remediation and mark a reconciliation case A processed linked to a payment message B and an account C
preconditions: I can only apply remediation and mark a reconciliation case A processed linked to a payment message B and an account C if it is the case that a remediation ticket is created for A and A is pending remediation and A is linked to the payment message B and A is linked to the account C
effects: Once I apply remediation and mark a reconciliation case A processed linked to a payment message B and an account C, it is the case that A has been processed for remediation

Once I apply remediation and mark a reconciliation case A processed linked to a payment message B and an account C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending remediation and it is not the case anymore that evidence is attached to A and it is not the case anymore that A requires manager approval

reapply_evidence_after_remediation.description: reapply evidence after remediation for a reconciliation case A using an instruction reference B with an operator C
preconditions: I can only reapply evidence after remediation for a reconciliation case A using an instruction reference B with an operator C if it is the case that A has been processed for remediation and a remediation ticket is created for A and the transaction is linked to the case A and A is a case instruction reference candidate for B and C is available
I can only reapply evidence after remediation for a reconciliation case A using an instruction reference B with an operator C if it is not the case that evidence is attached to A
effects: Once I reapply evidence after remediation for a reconciliation case A using an instruction reference B with an operator C, it is the case that evidence is attached to A

verify_instruction_reference_for_settlem.description: verify an instruction reference B for settlement matching of a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only verify an instruction reference B for settlement matching of a reconciliation case A if it is the case that a remediation ticket is created for A and evidence is attached to A and A is a case instruction reference candidate for B

I can only verify an instruction reference B for settlement matching of a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A is pending remediation and it is not the case that A is ready for settlement matching
effects: Once I verify an instruction reference B for settlement matching of a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is ready for settlement matching

verify_evidence_document_for_settlement_.description: verify an evidence document B for settlement matching of a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only verify an evidence document B for settlement matching of a reconciliation case A if it is the case that a remediation ticket is created for A and evidence is attached to A and B is available

I can only verify an evidence document B for settlement matching of a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A is pending remediation and it is not the case that A is ready for settlement matching
effects: Once I verify an evidence document B for settlement matching of a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is ready for settlement matching
Once I verify an evidence document B for settlement matching of a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

confirm_settlement_association.description: confirm settlement association between a reconciliation case A and a settlement event B
preconditions: I can only confirm settlement association between a reconciliation case A and a settlement event B if it is the case that A is ready for settlement matching and B is available and A is a case settlement candidate from nostro for B
effects: Once I confirm settlement association between a reconciliation case A and a settlement event B, it is the case that A has a confirmed settlement with B
Once I confirm settlement association between a reconciliation case A and a settlement event B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

link_cross_ledger_settlement_event.description: link cross ledger settlement event for a vostro case A and a nostro case B with a settlement event C
preconditions: I can only link cross ledger settlement event for a vostro case A and a nostro case B with a settlement event C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A is a vostro view and A is a case settlement candidate from vostro for C and B has a confirmed settlement with C
I can only link cross ledger settlement event for a vostro case A and a nostro case B with a settlement event C if it is not the case that A is linked to the case settlement for C
effects: Once I link cross ledger settlement event for a vostro case A and a nostro case B with a settlement event C, it is the case that A is linked to the case settlement for C

mark_evidence_review_complete.description: mark evidence review complete for a vostro view A with an instruction reference B by an operator C
preconditions: I can only mark evidence review complete for a vostro view A with an instruction reference B by an operator C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A is a vostro view and evidence is attached to A and A is ready for settlement matching and A is a case instruction reference candidate for B and C is available
I can only mark evidence review complete for a vostro view A with an instruction reference B by an operator C if it is not the case that the operator review for A is completed
effects: Once I mark evidence review complete for a vostro view A with an instruction reference B by an operator C, it is the case that the operator review for A is completed

close_case_with_nostro_signoff.description: close a nostro view A with signoff
preconditions: I can only close a nostro view A with signoff if it is the case that A is a nostro view and the case A is registered and the transaction is linked to the case A and A is accounting aligned and a remediation ticket is created for A and A is ready for settlement matching and evidence is attached to A
I can only close a nostro view A with signoff if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a nostro view A with signoff, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_settlement_event.description: close a vostro view A with a settlement event B
preconditions: I can only close a vostro view A with a settlement event B if it is the case that A is a vostro view and the case A is registered and the transaction is linked to the case A and A is accounting aligned and a remediation ticket is created for A and A is ready for settlement matching and evidence is attached to A and A is linked to the case settlement for B
I can only close a vostro view A with a settlement event B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a vostro view A with a settlement event B, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_operator_acknowledgement.description: close a vostro view A with operator acknowledgement
preconditions: I can only close a vostro view A with operator acknowledgement if it is the case that A is a vostro view and the case A is registered and the transaction is linked to the case A and A is accounting aligned and a remediation ticket is created for A and A is ready for settlement matching and evidence is attached to A and the operator review for A is completed
I can only close a vostro view A with operator acknowledgement if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a vostro view A with operator acknowledgement, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.create_case: create reconciliation case {?break_case} if it is closed and not registered
action_nl_templates.link_transaction_to_case: link external transaction {?external_transaction} to reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_transaction_from_case: unlink external transaction {?external_transaction} from reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.attach_instruction_reference: attach instruction reference {?instruction_reference} to reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.detach_instruction_reference: detach instruction reference {?instruction_reference} from reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.validate_instruction_reference: validate instruction reference {?instruction_reference} for reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.attach_evidence_and_validate_instruction: attach evidence document {?evidence_document} to reconciliation case {?break_case} and validate instruction
action_nl_templates.submit_evidence_for_review: submit evidence for review for reconciliation case {?break_case} with instruction reference {?instruction_reference} by operator {?operator}
action_nl_templates.attach_settlement_event_to_case: attach settlement event {?settlement_event} to reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.link_payment_message_to_case: link payment message {?payment_message} to reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_payment_message_from_case: unlink payment message {?payment_message} from reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.link_fee_to_case: link fee entry {?fee_entry} to reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_fee_from_case: unlink fee entry {?fee_entry} from reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.link_counterparty_to_case: link counterparty record {?counterparty_record} to reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_counterparty_from_case: unlink counterparty record {?counterparty_record} from reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.create_accounting_alignment_candidate: create accounting alignment candidate for reconciliation case {?break_case} with ledger entry {?ledger_entry}, payment message {?payment_message}, and account {?account}
action_nl_templates.create_complex_accounting_alignment: create complex accounting alignment for reconciliation case {?break_case} with ledger entry {?ledger_entry}, fee entry {?fee_entry}, and system ticket {?system_ticket}
action_nl_templates.approve_accounting_alignment: approve accounting alignment for reconciliation case {?break_case} with payment message {?payment_message} and account {?account}
action_nl_templates.create_remediation_ticket: create remediation ticket for reconciliation case {?break_case} linked to payment message {?payment_message} and account {?account} assigned to resolver team {?resolver_team}
action_nl_templates.escalate_and_create_remediation_ticket: escalate and create remediation ticket for reconciliation case {?break_case} linked to fee entry {?fee_entry} and counterparty record {?counterparty_record} assigned to escalation group {?escalation_group}
action_nl_templates.apply_remediation_and_mark_processed: apply remediation and mark reconciliation case {?break_case} processed linked to payment message {?payment_message} and account {?account}
action_nl_templates.reapply_evidence_after_remediation: reapply evidence after remediation for reconciliation case {?break_case} using instruction reference {?instruction_reference} with operator {?operator}
action_nl_templates.verify_instruction_reference_for_settlem: verify instruction reference {?instruction_reference} for settlement matching of reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.verify_evidence_document_for_settlement_: verify evidence document {?evidence_document} for settlement matching of reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_settlement_association: confirm settlement association between reconciliation case {?break_case} and settlement event {?settlement_event}
action_nl_templates.link_cross_ledger_settlement_event: link cross-ledger settlement event for vostro case {?vostro_account_view} and nostro case {?nostro_account_view} with settlement event {?settlement_event}
action_nl_templates.mark_evidence_review_complete: mark evidence review complete for vostro view {?break_case} with instruction reference {?instruction_reference} by operator {?operator}
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_settlement_event: close vostro view {?break_case} with settlement event {?settlement_event}
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_operator_acknowledgement: close vostro view {?break_case} with operator acknowledgement

predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_transaction: the case {?break_case} is linked to the transaction {?external_transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.case_transaction_linked: the transaction is linked to the case {?break_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_payment_message: {?break_case} is linked to the payment message {?payment_message}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_fee: {?break_case} is linked to the fee entry {?fee_entry}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_counterparty: {?break_case} is linked to the counterparty record {?counterparty_record}
predicate_nl_templates.case_linked_ledger_entry: {?break_case} is linked to the ledger entry {?ledger_entry}
predicate_nl_templates.remediation_ticket_created: a remediation ticket is created for {?break_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_settlement_candidate_from_vostro: {?break_case} is a case settlement candidate from vostro for {?settlement_event}
predicate_nl_templates.case_settlement_linked: {?break_case} is linked to the case settlement for {?settlement_event}
predicate_nl_templates.operator_review_completed: the operator review for {?break_case} is completed
predicate_nl_templates.external_transaction_available: {?external_transaction} is available as an external transaction
predicate_nl_templates.ledger_entry_available: {?ledger_entry} is available as a ledger entry
predicate_nl_templates.payment_message_available: {?payment_message} is available as a payment message
predicate_nl_templates.case_transaction_candidate: {?break_case} is a candidate for the transaction {?external_transaction}
predicate_nl_templates.case_ledger_entry_candidate: {?break_case} is a candidate for the ledger entry {?ledger_entry}
predicate_nl_templates.case_payment_message_candidate: {?break_case} is a candidate for the payment message {?payment_message}
predicate_nl_templates.case_account_candidate: {?break_case} is a candidate for the account {?account}
predicate_nl_templates.case_fee_candidate: {?break_case} is a candidate for the fee entry {?fee_entry}
predicate_nl_templates.case_system_ticket_candidate: {?break_case} is a candidate for the system ticket {?system_ticket}
predicate_nl_templates.case_counterparty_candidate: {?break_case} is a candidate for the counterparty record {?counterparty_record}
predicate_nl_templates.case_resolution_queue_assignment: {?break_case} is assigned to the resolution queue {?resolution_queue}
predicate_nl_templates.case_instruction_reference_candidate: {?break_case} is a case instruction reference candidate for {?instruction_reference}
predicate_nl_templates.case_settlement_candidate_from_nostro: {?break_case} is a case settlement candidate from nostro for {?settlement_event}

action_nl_templates_indef.create_case: create a reconciliation case {?break_case} if it is closed and not registered
action_nl_templates_indef.link_transaction_to_case: link an external transaction {?external_transaction} to a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_transaction_from_case: unlink an external transaction {?external_transaction} from a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_instruction_reference: attach an instruction reference {?instruction_reference} to a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_instruction_reference: detach an instruction reference {?instruction_reference} from a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.validate_instruction_reference: validate an instruction reference {?instruction_reference} for a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_evidence_and_validate_instruction: attach an evidence document {?evidence_document} to a reconciliation case {?break_case} and validate instruction
action_nl_templates_indef.submit_evidence_for_review: submit evidence for review for a reconciliation case {?break_case} with an instruction reference {?instruction_reference} by an operator {?operator}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_settlement_event_to_case: attach a settlement event {?settlement_event} to a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_payment_message_to_case: link a payment message {?payment_message} to a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_payment_message_from_case: unlink a payment message {?payment_message} from a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_account_to_case: link an account {?account} to a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_account_from_case: unlink an account {?account} from a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_fee_to_case: link a fee entry {?fee_entry} to a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_fee_from_case: unlink a fee entry {?fee_entry} from a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_counterparty_to_case: link a counterparty record {?counterparty_record} to a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_counterparty_from_case: unlink a counterparty record {?counterparty_record} from a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.create_accounting_alignment_candidate: create accounting alignment candidate for a reconciliation case {?break_case} with a ledger entry {?ledger_entry}, a payment message {?payment_message}, and an account {?account}
action_nl_templates_indef.create_complex_accounting_alignment: create complex accounting alignment for a reconciliation case {?break_case} with a ledger entry {?ledger_entry}, a fee entry {?fee_entry}, and a system ticket {?system_ticket}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_accounting_alignment: approve accounting alignment for a reconciliation case {?break_case} with a payment message {?payment_message} and an account {?account}
action_nl_templates_indef.create_remediation_ticket: create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case {?break_case} linked to a payment message {?payment_message} and an account {?account} assigned to a resolver team {?resolver_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.escalate_and_create_remediation_ticket: escalate and create remediation ticket for a reconciliation case {?break_case} linked to a fee entry {?fee_entry} and a counterparty record {?counterparty_record} assigned to an escalation group {?escalation_group}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_remediation_and_mark_processed: apply remediation and mark a reconciliation case {?break_case} processed linked to a payment message {?payment_message} and an account {?account}
action_nl_templates_indef.reapply_evidence_after_remediation: reapply evidence after remediation for a reconciliation case {?break_case} using an instruction reference {?instruction_reference} with an operator {?operator}
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_instruction_reference_for_settlem: verify an instruction reference {?instruction_reference} for settlement matching of a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_evidence_document_for_settlement_: verify an evidence document {?evidence_document} for settlement matching of a reconciliation case {?break_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_settlement_association: confirm settlement association between a reconciliation case {?break_case} and a settlement event {?settlement_event}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_cross_ledger_settlement_event: link cross-ledger settlement event for a vostro case {?vostro_account_view} and a nostro case {?nostro_account_view} with a settlement event {?settlement_event}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_evidence_review_complete: mark evidence review complete for a vostro view {?break_case} with an instruction reference {?instruction_reference} by an operator {?operator}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_nostro_signoff: close a nostro view {?break_case} with signoff
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_settlement_event: close a vostro view {?break_case} with a settlement event {?settlement_event}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_operator_acknowledgement: close a vostro view {?break_case} with operator acknowledgement

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a reconciliation case or a external transaction or a ledger entry or a account or a payment message or a fee entry or a instruction reference or a evidence document or a settlement event or a operator or a system ticket or a counterparty record or a resolution group is also a object
Everything that is a resolver team or a escalation group is also a resolution group
Everything that is a nostro case or a vostro case is also a reconciliation case
